pages.title: Botox Clinic London | Botox & Dermal Fillers in Islington, London
pages.text: Welcome to our Botox and Fillers Clinic in London. £10 consultation fee. Our Medical Aesthetic Practitioner has over 23 years of international experience in injectables and dermal fillers. Botox is clinically proven for wrinkle reduction.

pages.title: Pricing
pages.text: Botox 1 Area £160. Botox 2 Areas £200. Botox 3 Areas £250. Dermal filler pricing available on consultation.

pages.title: Lip Fillers Guide
pages.text: Lip filler and dermal filler treatments, clinically proven, delivered by our injectables team.

corpus.footerText: Botox Clinic London, Islington, London. Injectables and dermal fillers.
